nodes.context: Large street gang and organized crime group based in Manenberg, Cape Town.
One of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town, rival to Hard Livings.
Vigilante group that killed members of Hard Livings.
Local gang associated with Hard Livings.
Local gang associated with Hard Livings.
Italian organized crime group that cooperated with Hard Livings in diamond and cannabis trafficking.
Allied with Hard Livings per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hard Livings used to be one of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town with the other one being The Americans .
edges.context: Hard Livings and The Americans are the two super gangs in Cape Town, implying rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang started out as a criminal street gang mostly involved in drug distribution for which they competed with the Americans gang.
edges.context: Hard Livings competed with The Americans for drug distribution.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1996 Rashaad was publicly set alight and killed by the vigilante group PAGAD .
edges.context: PAGAD killed a leader of Hard Livings.

edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.
edges.context: Hard Livings has associations with Westbury gang.

edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.
edges.context: Hard Livings has associations with Varador Cortet.

edges.evidence_quote: Internationally they have been known to have cooperated with the Sicilian mafia in the trafficking of illegal diamonds as well as trafficking cannabis to Europe.
edges.context: Hard Livings cooperated with Sicilian Mafia in diamond and cannabis trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nigerian mafia , Triads , Sicilian Mafia
edges.context: Hard Livings is allied with Nigerian mafia per infobox.
